subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Covenant! Your letter, which began in English and concluded in Persian, hath been perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده میثاق مکتوب آنجناب که بدایتش بانگلیسی و نهایتش بپارسی مرقوم ملاحظه
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @service to others; to the Cause of God
